requirement_topic.en: Energy Label — Sri Lanka Star-Rating Energy Label (SLSEA / SLSI)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——斯里兰卡星级能效标签（SLSEA / SLSI）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——斯里蘭卡星級能效標籤（SLSEA / SLSI）

summary.en: Refrigerators supplied in Sri Lanka are subject to the national comparative energy label administered by the Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority （SLSEA） in coordination with SLSI. The label is a star-rating scheme （more stars = higher efficiency） that displays the model's measured energy performance and annual energy consumption, enabling consumers to compare appliances. Suppliers/importers must have the model tested against the adopted SLS/IEC measurement standard, obtain the corresponding star rating, register the model, and display the SLSEA energy label on the appliance at point of sale. The label format, star bands, and registration process are defined by SLSEA. This is a comparative label distinct from the safety SLS mark, and is separate from （though complementary to） the Minimum Energy Performance Standards covered in the companion row.
summary.zh: 在斯里兰卡供应的电冰箱须遵守由斯里兰卡可持续能源管理局（SLSEA）会同SLSI管理的国家比较性能效标签。该标签为星级评定制度（星级越多，能效越高），展示型号的实测能效性能及年耗电量，便于消费者比较器具。供应商/进口商须依据采用的SLS/IEC测量标准对型号进行测试，取得相应星级评定，注册型号，并在销售点于器具上展示SLSEA能效标签。标签格式、星级区间及注册流程由SLSEA规定。该标签为比较性标签，区别于安全用SLS标志，并与配套行所涵盖的最低能效标准相互独立（但互为补充）。
summary.zht: 在斯里蘭卡供應的電冰箱須遵守由斯里蘭卡可持續能源管理局（SLSEA）會同SLSI管理的國家比較性能效標籤。該標籤為星級評定制度（星級越多，能效越高），展示型號的實測能效性能及年耗電量，便於消費者比較器具。供應商/進口商須依據採用的SLS/IEC測量標準對型號進行測試，取得相應星級評定，登記型號，並在銷售點於器具上展示SLSEA能效標籤。標籤格式、星級區間及登記流程由SLSEA規定。該標籤為比較性標籤，區別於安全用SLS標誌，並與配套行所涵蓋的最低能效標準相互獨立（但互為補充）。

standards_or_laws: SLSEA energy label scheme for refrigerators (star-rating comparative label) — Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority
SLS/IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis adopted by SLSI/SLSEA)
Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority Act — enabling framework for energy labelling

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label （CEL） under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision）, displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale （Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold） and annual energy consumption, based on GB 12021.2-2015 and administered through CNIS. Manufacturers self-declare the grade from testing against GB 12021.2. The Chinese grade scale and the Sri Lanka star-rating scale are structurally different presentation systems and are not directly interchangeable; a Chinese CEL grade does not produce a Sri Lanka star rating without testing and registration under the SLSEA scheme.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，基于GB 12021.2-2015，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级。中国的等级体系与斯里兰卡的星级体系为结构不同的呈现方式，不可直接互换；中国CEL等级在未经SLSEA制度下测试和注册前，不会自动产生斯里兰卡星级评定。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，基於GB 12021.2-2015，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。中國的等級體系與斯里蘭卡的星級體系為結構不同的呈現方式，不可直接互換；中國CEL等級在未經SLSEA制度下測試和登記前，不會自動產生斯里蘭卡星級評定。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The China Energy Label cannot serve as the Sri Lanka energy label: (1) the model must be tested to the SLS/IEC 62552-series measurement basis accepted by SLSEA/SLSI and converted into the Sri Lanka star rating — a Chinese 1-to-5 grade does not map onto the star bands; (2) the model must be registered under the SLSEA scheme and the SLSEA energy label physically displayed at point of sale; (3) annual energy consumption figures must reflect SLSEA test conditions, which may differ from the GB 12021.2 conditions used for the CEL. Exporters should obtain or commission EN/IEC 62552-series test data and work with the Sri Lanka importer to complete SLSEA registration and labelling before retail supply. Confirm the current star-band thresholds and registration procedure directly with SLSEA.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能充当斯里兰卡能效标签：（1）型号须依据SLSEA/SLSI接受的SLS/IEC 62552系列测量基准进行测试，并转换为斯里兰卡星级评定——中国1至5级不能映射到星级区间；（2）型号须在SLSEA制度下注册，并在销售点实物展示SLSEA能效标签；（3）年耗电量数值须反映SLSEA测试条件，该条件可能与用于CEL的GB 12021.2条件不同。出口商应取得或委托IEC 62552系列测试数据，并与斯里兰卡进口商合作，在零售供应前完成SLSEA注册和标签。请直接向SLSEA确认现行星级区间门槛及注册流程。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能充當斯里蘭卡能效標籤：（1）型號須依據SLSEA/SLSI接受的SLS/IEC 62552系列測量基準進行測試，並轉換為斯里蘭卡星級評定——中國1至5級不能映射到星級區間；（2）型號須在SLSEA制度下登記，並在銷售點實物展示SLSEA能效標籤；（3）年耗電量數值須反映SLSEA測試條件，該條件可能與用於CEL的GB 12021.2條件不同。出口商應取得或委託IEC 62552系列測試數據，並與斯里蘭卡進口商合作，在零售供應前完成SLSEA登記和標籤。請直接向SLSEA確認現行星級區間門檻及登記流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SLSEA star-rating energy label registration and display required for refrigerators supplied in Sri Lanka
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Sri Lanka SLSEA star-rating energy label, registered and displayed at point of sale, is required for refrigerators. The Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label does not satisfy it — the model must be tested to the SLS/IEC 62552 basis, assigned a star rating, and registered with SLSEA via the Sri Lanka importer. Confirm current star-band thresholds and registration steps with SLSEA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱须取得并在销售点展示经注册的斯里兰卡SLSEA星级能效标签。中国1至5级能效标识不能满足该要求——型号须依据SLS/IEC 62552基准测试、评定星级，并经斯里兰卡进口商向SLSEA注册。请向SLSEA确认现行星级区间门槛及注册步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱須取得並在銷售點展示經登記的斯里蘭卡SLSEA星級能效標籤。中國1至5級能效標識不能滿足該要求——型號須依據SLS/IEC 62552基準測試、評定星級，並經斯里蘭卡進口商向SLSEA登記。請向SLSEA確認現行星級區間門檻及登記步驟。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards （MEPS） — Refrigerators (SLSEA / SLSI)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——电冰箱（SLSEA / SLSI）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——電冰箱（SLSEA / SLSI）

summary.en: Beyond the comparative star label, Sri Lanka applies Minimum Energy Performance Standards （MEPS） for refrigerators, under which models that fall below a minimum efficiency threshold （the lowest qualifying star band） may not be legally supplied to the market. MEPS are set and updated by SLSEA in coordination with SLSI and are tied to the same SLS/IEC 62552-series measurement basis used for the energy label. The purpose is to remove the least efficient appliances from sale. Importers must ensure each refrigerator model meets the current minimum star/efficiency threshold before import and retail; models below the floor are non-compliant regardless of having any star label. Thresholds are revised periodically and tighten over time.
summary.zh: 除比较性星级标签外，斯里兰卡对电冰箱实施最低能效标准（MEPS），凡低于最低能效门槛（最低合格星级区间）的型号不得合法供应市场。MEPS由SLSEA会同SLSI制定和更新，并与能效标签所用的同一SLS/IEC 62552系列测量基准挂钩，目的是淘汰能效最低的器具。进口商须确保每款电冰箱型号在进口和零售前达到现行最低星级/能效门槛；低于下限的型号即使具有星级标签亦属不合规。门槛定期修订并随时间趋严。
summary.zht: 除比較性星級標籤外，斯里蘭卡對電冰箱實施最低能效標準（MEPS），凡低於最低能效門檻（最低合格星級區間）的型號不得合法供應市場。MEPS由SLSEA會同SLSI制定和更新，並與能效標籤所用的同一SLS/IEC 62552系列測量基準掛鈎，目的是淘汰能效最低的器具。進口商須確保每款電冰箱型號在進口和零售前達到現行最低星級/能效門檻；低於下限的型號即使具有星級標籤亦屬不合規。門檻定期修訂並隨時間趨嚴。

standards_or_laws: SLSEA Minimum Energy Performance Standards （MEPS） for refrigerators — Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority
SLS/IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for refrigerator energy performance
Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority Act — enabling framework

summary.en: China sets minimum energy performance through GB 12021.2-2015, which defines the minimum allowable values of energy efficiency （the Grade 5 threshold acts as the floor below which a refrigerator cannot be legally sold） alongside the higher grades. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR/NDRC and is the basis for the China Energy Label. Although both China （GB 12021.2 minimum value） and Sri Lanka （SLSEA MEPS） operate a minimum-efficiency floor, the threshold levels, the test methodology, and the grade-vs-star presentation differ, so meeting the Chinese minimum does not guarantee meeting the Sri Lanka MEPS floor.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 12021.2-2015设定最低能效，规定能效限定值（5级门槛作为下限，低于该值的电冰箱不得合法销售）以及更高等级。该标准为强制性，由SAMR/NDRC执行，是中国能效标识的依据。尽管中国（GB 12021.2限定值）与斯里兰卡（SLSEA MEPS）均实施最低能效下限，但门槛水平、测试方法及等级与星级的呈现方式不同，故达到中国最低值不等于满足斯里兰卡MEPS下限。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 12021.2-2015設定最低能效，規定能效限定值（5級門檻作為下限，低於該值的電冰箱不得合法銷售）以及更高等級。該標準為強制性，由SAMR/NDRC執行，是中國能效標識的依據。儘管中國（GB 12021.2限定值）與斯里蘭卡（SLSEA MEPS）均實施最低能效下限，但門檻水平、測試方法及等級與星級的呈現方式不同，故達到中國最低值不等於滿足斯里蘭卡MEPS下限。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC)

gap.en: Both markets impose a minimum-efficiency floor, but they are not interchangeable: (1) the Sri Lanka MEPS threshold is expressed in the SLSEA star/efficiency framework measured to SLS/IEC 62552, whereas the Chinese floor is the GB 12021.2 minimum allowable value — a model meeting the Chinese minimum may still fall below the Sri Lanka MEPS floor; (2) exporters must verify each model's measured performance against the current SLSEA MEPS threshold using SLS/IEC 62552-basis data, not the GB 12021.2 result; (3) because SLSEA periodically tightens the MEPS floor, a model compliant in one year may fail after a revision, so the threshold should be re-checked for each shipment cycle. Importers carry the obligation to keep only compliant models in their range. Confirm the current MEPS floor value with SLSEA before committing to a model mix.
gap.zh: 两个市场均设有最低能效下限，但不可互换：（1）斯里兰卡MEPS门槛以SLSEA星级/能效框架表达，依据SLS/IEC 62552测量，而中国下限为GB 12021.2能效限定值——满足中国最低值的型号仍可能低于斯里兰卡MEPS下限；（2）出口商须使用SLS/IEC 62552基准数据（而非GB 12021.2结果）核实每款型号的实测性能是否达到现行SLSEA MEPS门槛；（3）由于SLSEA定期收紧MEPS下限，某年合规的型号在修订后可能不合格，故应在每个发货周期重新核查门槛。进口商有义务在其产品系列中仅保留合规型号。请在确定型号组合前向SLSEA确认现行MEPS下限值。
gap.zht: 兩個市場均設有最低能效下限，但不可互換：（1）斯里蘭卡MEPS門檻以SLSEA星級/能效框架表達，依據SLS/IEC 62552測量，而中國下限為GB 12021.2能效限定值——滿足中國最低值的型號仍可能低於斯里蘭卡MEPS下限；（2）出口商須使用SLS/IEC 62552基準數據（而非GB 12021.2結果）核實每款型號的實測性能是否達到現行SLSEA MEPS門檻；（3）由於SLSEA定期收緊MEPS下限，某年合規的型號在修訂後可能不合格，故應在每個發貨週期重新核查門檻。進口商有義務在其產品系列中僅保留合規型號。請在確定型號組合前向SLSEA確認現行MEPS下限值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerators below the SLSEA MEPS minimum-efficiency threshold may not be legally supplied in Sri Lanka
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — refrigerators below the GB 12021.2-2015 minimum allowable value may not be legally sold in China; enforced by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka enforces Minimum Energy Performance Standards for refrigerators via SLSEA; models below the floor cannot be supplied. Meeting the Chinese GB 12021.2 minimum does not guarantee meeting the SLSEA MEPS floor, as thresholds and test methods differ and SLSEA tightens limits over time. Verify each model against the current SLSEA MEPS value using SLS/IEC 62552-basis data before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡通过SLSEA对电冰箱实施最低能效标准；低于下限的型号不得供应。满足中国GB 12021.2最低值不等于满足SLSEA MEPS下限，因门槛和测试方法不同，且SLSEA会随时间收紧限值。请在进口前使用SLS/IEC 62552基准数据核实每款型号是否达到现行SLSEA MEPS值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡通過SLSEA對電冰箱實施最低能效標準；低於下限的型號不得供應。滿足中國GB 12021.2最低值不等於滿足SLSEA MEPS下限，因門檻和測試方法不同，且SLSEA會隨時間收緊限值。請在進口前使用SLS/IEC 62552基準數據核實每款型號是否達到現行SLSEA MEPS值。
